Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3

Class FlixelLwjgl3Window

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3Window
All Implemented Interfaces:
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.window.FlixelWindow, me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.functional.FlixelShakeable
public final class FlixelLwjgl3Window extends Object implements me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.window.FlixelWindow
GLFW-backed FlixelWindow for the LWJGL3 backend.

Desktop see-through uses FlixelGame.applyBackdropForDesktopTransparency(boolean) from the default FlixelWindow.setDesktopTransparencyActive(boolean) implementation. Do not call glfwSetWindowAttrib(GLFW_TRANSPARENT_FRAMEBUFFER, ...): GLFW reports GLFW_INVALID_ENUM and it is not a supported dynamic attribute on common platforms.

Window position updates use a single logical (x, y) pair and at most one postRunnable per frame batch so separate setX(int) and setY(int) calls (for example from independent tween goals) still produce one consistent glfwSetWindowPos snapshot without stale axis readbacks.
